name: Kyiv Oblast (Ukraine)

colors.symbolism: the heraldic colour of historic Kyiv and the Dnipro river
the cross at the centre — an emblem evoking Saint Volodymyr and the Christianisation of Rus'

description: A blue field with a wide yellow vertical band at the centre overlaid by a small device.
history: Approved on 2 February 1999. The design was created by the artist Vasyl Bosenko. Kyiv Oblast surrounds (but does not administratively include) the city of Kyiv.

features.symbolism: the historic golden cross / Saint Volodymyr's emblem
